productDisplayName: Little Miss Women Printed Green Tshirt
description: Composition Parrot green T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and rubber with flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Mashine wash inside out with similar colours in warm water Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on decorations If you are the curious type wanting to find answers to everything, then this T-shirt from little miss is perfect for you. The rubber and flock print adds to your girly charm, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair this with jeans and sneakers.
